ops.text: captain-hook's builtin general pack preload nudge (builtin_packs/general/hooks/prompts/tools/preload_nudge.md) tells every session to 'leave every other deferred tool (Cron*, Design*, rarely-used MCP tools) unloaded' — actively steering agents away from pack-relevant MCP tools. Observed in transcript 876fcee3: 14 of 18 deferred cc-context tools got zero calls while resident grep got 8, including four serial single-term greps where ccx_code_symbol was the guard pack's own recommendation. The nudge should carve out tool sets other packs announce (cc-context now ships its own SessionStart preload nudge), or say 'unless another nudge names them'. Separate papercut: cc-notes cannot open repos with extensions.worktreeConfig (every Conductor checkout of this repo) — 'core.repositoryformatversion does not support extension: worktreeconfig'; had to record this via a fresh /tmp clone + ref push.
